patches.description: Inlines pairip's static call-wrapper stubs ($<number>) back into their call sites and removes the stubs.
patches.name: Inline pairip call wrappers

patches.description: Restores obfuscated strings and removes pairip bytecode protection.
patches.name: Remove pairip protection

patches.description: Inlines methods hidden in $c<number> helper classes back into the host class, then removes those helper and reflection method-holder classes.
patches.name: Restore extracted methods

patches.description: Removes .line (line numbers) and .source (source file name) debug data from every class. Optional, disabled by default.
patches.name: Strip debug info
